name: SWS GOLF PERFORMANCE
about: SWS Golf Performance is a specialized golf training facility in Springfield, Missouri focused on improving game performance through technology and coaching. The venue utilizes high-end Uneekor technology for swing analysis and provides comprehensive programs designed to help golfers overcome plateaus and inconsistencies. The facility includes golf simulators, a fitness area, and a short game area, offering both foundational lessons and a long-term Golf Performance program. The facility also operates as a 24/7 access center for members and is staffed by an integrated support team of professionals, including a mental performance coach and a physical therapist.
why_golfers_like_it: Equipped with high-end Uneekor technology providing detailed club data for swing analysis
Offers a structured 'Brain Body Intelligence' process for long-term improvement beyond basic lessons
Comprehensive facility with simulators, fitness area, and short game practice space

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service; BYOB policy not specified
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end Uneekor technology used for club data and swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, coaching services include help with picking out the correct set of clubs if you don't have your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on outside food or drink.

faq.question: How long is an 18-hole simulator session?
Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, they offer specific programs for juniors and beginners, and their 'Ladies Beginning 101' series is suitable for first-time players.
